message:
fix(core): unify cmp_values with SQLite type ordering and precision-preserving int-float comparison

cmp_values() had two critical bugs:
1. Mixed-type comparisons (Integer vs Text, etc.) fell through to
   Ordering::Equal — e.g. `5 = 'hello'` was true
2. Integer-float comparisons used lossy `as f64` cast, incorrect for
   |i| > 2^53

Now uses type_rank() for proper SQLite ordering (NULL < numeric < text
< blob) and precision-preserving int_float_cmp() algorithm. Also fixes
same lossy casts in cmp_sqlite_values().

Adds 4 regression tests. 234 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
